contracts.note: NVDA call buyers are aggressively lifting offers on expiring contracts, with today's volume already exceeding open interest and an additional 24k contracts traded this hour alone. The 5% out-of-the-money strike with zero days to expiration, trading on the ask, suggests a tactical bet on a significant intraday move or a last-ditch effort to roll positions.

The 91% implied volatility suggests the market is pricing in a significant move, and the $0 premium indicates these are likely very cheap, speculative bets on a large, imminent price swing.
